summary: Solid PowerShell + YAML implementation. Core strengths: proper Set-StrictMode/ErrorActionPreference throughout, parameter validation, pinned actions (actions/checkout@v4), least-privilege perms, pure classification functions isolated from I/O, excellent XML documentation. Critical gap: workflow references fixtures/secrets.json as default env var but file is not provided—repo won't run without either checking it in or clear setup docs. Test harness mitigates by creating fixtures for act, but doesn't solve cold-start scenario. Minor: repetitive test case boilerplate in harness (defs ~120–170) could use helper factory. Otherwise, architecture is clean with proper job dependencies and error handling.
